channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 2026 FIFA World Cup kicks off with Shakira at 1st of 3 opening ceremonies
item.description: With matches across 11 cities in the U.S., Mexico, and Canada, fans will experience three separate World Cup opening ceremonies.

item.title: Five police officers fatally shot in Mexico as World Cup begins
item.description: Authorities reported that five Mexican police officers were killed and five others wounded just before the World Cup opener in Mexico City.

item.title: California congressional race to gauge progressive strength
item.description: Populist insurgent Randy Villegas won the Democratic primary for a House seat in California's Central Valley.

item.title: UN says nearly 118 million displaced by conflict, persecution last year
item.description: The UN refugee agency noted that forced displacement from conflict or persecution declined in 2025 for the first time in ten years.
